sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44311" key="e)u)+krhmnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐὐκρημνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44311.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with fair cliffs</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:251" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.251</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
